coverage_assessment.description: Overall assessment of coverage: what was covered well, what was missed.

area.description: The under-covered area: a module, directory, attack class, or code path.

reason.description: Why this area was missed or under-covered.

suggested_files.description: Files that should have been examined but were not.

suggested_attack_classes.description: Attack classes that should be applied to this area.

severity.description: How critical it is to fill this gap.

new_tasks.description: New hunt tasks to fill the identified gaps.

scope_hint.description: Narrow scope description for the hunt agent.

target_files.description: Files to focus the hunt on.

rationale.description: Why this task fills a gap.

skip_gapfill.description: If true, no gaps were found and the pipeline should skip re-hunting.
